frontmatter.title: google-gemini/gemini-cli（Google 官方 Gemini CLI）
frontmatter.description: Google 开源 Gemini 终端 coding agent — TS + Ink + 7 包 monorepo，Gemini3 + 1M context + MCP + Hooks + Skills + Subagents
frontmatter.tier_group: MCP 生态 + 同类工具
frontmatter.notes: subagent v2：主 Claude pre-seed cache（v1 因 API 429 失败）

cross_check_anchors.verbatim: Free tier: 60 requests/min and 1,000 requests/day with personal Google account. Powerful Gemini 3 models: Access to improved reasoning and 1M token context window. Built-in tools: Google Search grounding, file operations, shell commands, web fetching. MCP support.
Authentication Options: Option 1: Sign in with Google ... Option 2: Gemini API Key ... Option 3: Vertex AI
Runtime: Node.js (>=20.0.0), Language: TypeScript, UI Framework: React (using Ink for CLI rendering); Monorepo: packages/cli, packages/core, packages/a2a-server, packages/sdk
Understand the context hierarchy ... Global context file: ~/.gemini/GEMINI.md ... Environment and workspace context files ... Just-in-time (JIT) context files
Gemini CLI supports three MCP transport types: Stdio Transport, SSE Transport, Streamable HTTP

audience_judgment_basis: cs_background=yes 因 monorepo + Ink + esbuild + MCP client/server 详解，体系深；devops=mid 因 Dockerfile + sandbox + telemetry + trusted folders + Vertex AI 部署，但无 k8s/operator；cc_experience=used 因直接对照 CC 的 CLAUDE.md / MCP transport / Subagent / Skills / Memory 等价物，便于已用 CC 用户快速迁移心智
fetched_via_log: pre-seeded cache; ls + cat + Read only, no network (v1 因 API 429 失败，v2 主 Claude pre-seed cache)
exposed_problems: A2A protocol vs MCP 边界不明（packages/a2a-server 与 packages/core/src/tools/mcp-* 同时存在），需要 deep-dive 厘清
Gemini 3 在 1M context 下对长 repo 的有效率没有官方 benchmark
model routing 自动 fallback 的判定策略 / 触发条件 docs 没有明示
_validation_issues_at_subagent_return: P19: audience_tags.cc_experience='yes' 违规（应为 newbie/used/advanced），改 used
P23: body 含 HTML entity > 需 unescape
P21: char_count 1798 (subagent 自报 Python len)，主 Claude 需 wc -m 重测
P30(新): subagent 违规自行写盘到 apps/docs/content/docs/research/gemini-cli.{mdx,json}（prompt 明确说「不要写盘」）；主 Claude 已清理
